context: Tests whether the agent respects Horizon schema range constraints and uses the correct Horizon setting keys. Horizon section/block padding uses the keys 'padding-block-start' and 'padding-block-end' (NOT Dawn's 'padding_top'/'padding_bottom'), each a range of 0-100 with step 1 (whole integers only). 'gap' is also 0-100 step 1. 'border_width' uses step 0.5 (range 0-10). Off-range, non-integer, or wrong-key values cause theme validation failures or are silently dropped.

checklist.name: Correct Horizon padding keys
checklist.description: Padding settings in templates/index.json use the Horizon keys 'padding-block-start' and 'padding-block-end' (and optionally 'padding-inline-start'/'padding-inline-end'). The Dawn-style keys 'padding_top' and 'padding_bottom' do NOT appear.

checklist.name: Padding values within 0-100
checklist.description: Every padding-block-start / padding-block-end value present in templates/index.json is between 0 and 100 inclusive (e.g., 0, 16, 24, 48, 64, 100 — NOT 120, 150, 200, or negative values)

checklist.name: Padding values are whole integers
checklist.description: Every padding-block-start / padding-block-end value is a whole integer (step is 1). No fractional values like 12.5 or 33.3 appear.

checklist.name: gap values within range
checklist.description: If 'gap' settings appear on sections or group blocks in templates/index.json, every value is a whole integer between 0 and 100 inclusive

checklist.name: border_width step 0.5 (if used)
checklist.description: If 'border_width' appears in templates/index.json, its value is a multiple of 0.5 within 0-10 (e.g., 0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2 — NOT 0.3, 0.7, 12)

checklist.name: Explicit padding on hero section
checklist.description: The 'hero' section in templates/index.json has explicit padding-block-start and padding-block-end values set

checklist.name: Explicit padding on tiers section
checklist.description: The tier picker section in templates/index.json has explicit padding-block-start and padding-block-end values set

checklist.name: Explicit padding on FAQ section
checklist.description: The FAQ section in templates/index.json has explicit padding-block-start and padding-block-end values set

checklist.name: Full homepage structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected parts of the Horizon homepage: a 'hero' section, two 'custom-liquid' anchor sections, and 'section' containers for how-it-works, tiers, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ (with an 'accordion' block), and email capture (with an 'email-signup' block)

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
